name: Cosmetic Storage Container with Bamboo Lid - Brightroom™
description:
Get ready for the day conveniently using the Cosmetic Storage Container with Bamboo Lid from Brightroom™. This cosmetic container features divided compartments that provide ample space and organization, as well as a lid with a built-in mirror to make getting ready quick and easy. Made from bamboo and plastic, this rectangle storage dispenser is a practical addition to your vanity.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
